mapper.sql: application_id, student_id, position_id, student_name, company_name, position_name, region, city, current_stage, interview_time, coaching_status, lead_mentor_id, lead_mentor_name, assign_status, requested_mentor_count, preferred_mentor_names, stage_updated, submitted_at, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, remark
mapper.select:
select app.application_id as id, app.position_id as positionId, app.company_name as company, app.position_name as position, coalesce(app.city, app.region, '') as location, coalesce(position_ref.industry, '') as industry, coalesce(position_ref.position_category, '') as positionCategory, coalesce(position_ref.region, '') as region, coalesce(position_ref.recruitment_cycle, '') as recruitmentCycle, coalesce(date_format(app.submitted_at, '%Y-%m-%d'), '') as submittedAt, case lower(app.current_stage) when 'applied' then 'applied' when 'hirevue' then 'interviewing' when 'hirevue / ot' then 'interviewing' when 'screening' then 'interviewing' when 'screening_call' then 'interviewing' when 'first' then 'interviewing' when 'first_round' then 'interviewing' when 'second' then 'interviewing' when 'second_round' then 'interviewing' when 'third' then 'interviewing' when 'third_round' then 'interviewing' when 'case' then 'interviewing' when 'case_study' then 'interviewing' when 'superday' then 'interviewing' when 'offer' then 'offer' when 'rejected' then 'rejected' when 'withdraw' then 'withdraw' else 'applied' end as applicationStatus, case when lower(coalesce(position_ref.industry, '')) like '%consult%' then 'consulting' when lower(coalesce(position_ref.industry, '')) like '%tech%' then 'tech' when lower(coalesce(position_ref.industry, '')) like '%pe%' or lower(coalesce(position_ref.industry, '')) like '%vc%' then 'pevc' else 'ib' end as companyType, app.current_stage as stage, case lower(app.current_stage) when 'applied' then '已投递' when 'hirevue' then 'HireVue / OT' when 'hirevue / ot' then 'HireVue / OT' when 'first' then 'First Round' when 'first_round' then 'First Round' when 'second' then 'Second Round' when 'second_round' then 'Second Round' when 'case' then 'Case Study' when 'case_study' then 'Case Study' when 'offer' then 'Offer' when 'rejected' then '已拒绝' else app.current_stage end as stageLabel, case lower(app.current_stage) when 'applied' then 'blue' when 'hirevue' then 'blue' when 'hirevue / ot' then 'blue' when 'first' then 'orange' when 'first_round' then 'orange' when 'second' then 'orange' when 'second_round' then 'orange' when 'case' then 'gold' when 'case_study' then 'gold' when 'offer' then 'green' when 'rejected' then 'red' else 'default' end as stageColor, coalesce(date_format(app.interview_time, '%m/%d %H:%i'), '-') as interviewTime, case when app.interview_time is not null then date_format(app.interview_time, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') else '-' end as interviewHint, case lower(coalesce(app.coaching_status, 'none')) when '辅导中' then 'coaching' when 'coaching' then 'coaching' when '待审批' then 'pending' when 'pending' then 'pending' else 'none' end as coachingStatus, case lower(coalesce(app.coaching_status, 'none')) when '辅导中' then '辅导中' when 'coaching' then '辅导中' when '待审批' then '待审批' when 'pending' then '待审批' else '无辅导' end as coachingStatusLabel, case lower(coalesce(app.coaching_status, 'none')) when '辅导中' then 'purple' when 'coaching' then 'purple' when '待审批' then 'warning' when 'pending' then 'warning' else 'default' end as coachingColor, coalesce(coaching_ref.mentor_name, '-') as mentor, coalesce(coaching_ref.mentor_name, '') as mentorName, coalesce(coaching_ref.mentor_names, coaching_ref.mentor_name, '') as mentorNames, '-' as mentorMeta, '-' as hoursFeedback, '-' as feedback, coalesce(date_format(app.interview_time, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s'), '') as interviewAt, coalesce(date_format(app.submitted_at, '%Y-%m-%d'), '') as appliedDate, '' as applyMethod, coalesce(app.remark, '') as progressNote from osg_job_application app left join osg_position position_ref on position_ref.position_id = app.position_id left join osg_coaching coaching_ref on coaching_ref.application_id = app.application_id
app.student_id = #{userId}
and app.current_stage not in ('cancelled', 'withdrawn')
and ( (app.interview_time is not null and app.interview_time >= str_to_date(#{fromIso}, '%Y-%m-%d')) or (app.interview_time is null and app.submitted_at >= str_to_date(#{fromIso}, '%Y-%m-%d')) )
and ( (app.interview_time is not null and app.interview_time < str_to_date(#{toIso}, '%Y-%m-%d')) or (app.interview_time is null and app.submitted_at < str_to_date(#{toIso}, '%Y-%m-%d')) )
order by app.submitted_at desc, app.application_id desc

select
from osg_job_application where application_id in
#{applicationId}
order by submitted_at desc, application_id desc

select
from osg_job_application where student_id in
#{sid}
and current_stage != 'withdrawn' order by submitted_at desc, application_id desc
mapper.insert: insert into osg_job_application ( student_id, position_id, student_name, company_name, position_name, region, city, current_stage, interview_time, coaching_status, lead_mentor_id, lead_mentor_name, assign_status, requested_mentor_count, preferred_mentor_names, stage_updated, submitted_at, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, remark ) values ( #{studentId}, #{positionId}, #{studentName}, #{companyName}, #{positionName}, #{region}, #{city}, #{currentStage}, #{interviewTime}, #{coachingStatus}, #{leadMentorId}, #{leadMentorName}, #{assignStatus}, #{requestedMentorCount}, #{preferredMentorNames}, #{stageUpdated}, #{submittedAt}, #{createBy}, sysdate(), #{updateBy}, sysdate(), #{remark} )
mapper.update: update osg_job_application set lead_mentor_id = #{leadMentorUserId}, update_time = sysdate() where student_id = #{studentId}
update osg_job_application set lead_mentor_id = #{leadMentorUserId}, update_time = sysdate() where application_id = #{applicationId} and lead_mentor_id is null
